category_sources: source_facts.description says recoverjpeg recovers JPEG images from a file system image; official homepage says it recovers lost files from damaged memory cards or USB drives.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is recoverjpeg; official homepage heading is recoverjpeg.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides project documentation and points to manual pages; official GitHub README includes installation and usage notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage gives the git clone URL and links to the GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies JPEG recovery from filesystem images; official homepage mentions recovering JFIF/JPEG pictures and MOV movies.
